    Class: COSDResearchView¶

    Flat research view combining file metadata, patient demographics, primary pathway, non-primary pathway, diagnostic procedures, staging, treatment, and outcomes data. Corresponds to RVW.COSD_RESEARCH_VIEW in the source database. Each row represents one COSD record.

    URI: [cosd:COSDResearchView](https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd/COSDResearchView) 
     classDiagram
    class COSDResearchView
    click COSDResearchView href "../COSDResearchView/"

    [String](String.md) | To provide additional information on the MDT Meeting type where not covered i... | direct | ## Identifier and Mapping Information ### Schema Source * from schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd ## Mappings | Mapping Type | Mapped Value | | --- | --- | | self | cosd:COSDResearchView | | native | cosd:COSDResearchView | ## LinkML Source ### Direct 
    name: COSDResearchView
description: Flat research view combining file metadata, patient demographics, primary
  pathway, non-primary pathway, diagnostic procedures, staging, treatment, and outcomes
  data. Corresponds to RVW.COSD_RESEARCH_VIEW in the source database. Each row represents
  one COSD record.
from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
slots:

- etl_date
- direct_care_published_runid

tree_root: true
    ### Induced 
    name: COSDResearchView
description: Flat research view combining file metadata, patient demographics, primary
  pathway, non-primary pathway, diagnostic procedures, staging, treatment, and outcomes
  data. Corresponds to RVW.COSD_RESEARCH_VIEW in the source database. Each row represents
  one COSD record.
from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
attributes:
  etl_id:
    name: etl_id
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: ETL_ID
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: INT
    description: Internal identifier for the ETL batch run that loaded this record.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: integer
    required: false
  etl_date:
    name: etl_date
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: ETL_DATE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATETIME
    description: Date and time the ETL process ran.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: datetime
    required: false
  direct_care_published_runid:
    name: direct_care_published_runid
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: DIRECT_CARE_PUBLISHED_RUNID
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: INT
    description: Run identifier from the DirectCare publishing pipeline.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: integer
    required: false
  dataset_name:
    name: dataset_name
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: DATASET_NAME
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: NVARCHAR(300)
    description: Name of the source dataset.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  ndo_run_date:
    name: ndo_run_date
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: NDO_RUN_DATE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: Date the National Data Opt-out (NDO) filter was applied to this record.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  file_name:
    name: file_name
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: FILE_NAME
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: NVARCHAR(1000)
    description: Name of the source COSD submission file.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:

        tag: sql_column
        value: RECORD_TYPE

        tag: sql_type
        value: NVARCHAR(100)

  pseudo_c000070_unique_record_id:
    name: pseudo_c000070_unique_record_id
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PSEUDO_C000070_UNIQUE_RECORD_ID
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARBINARY(100)
      sensitivity:
        tag: sensitivity
        value: pseudonymised
    description: The universal unique identifier (UUID) for the record
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pseudo_cr0010_nhs_number:
    name: pseudo_cr0010_nhs_number
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PSEUDO_CR0010_NHS_NUMBER
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARBINARY(100)
      sensitivity:
        tag: sensitivity
        value: pseudonymised
    description: The NHS NUMBER, the primary identifier of a PERSON, is a unique identifier
      for a PATIENT within the NHS in England and Wales. This will not vary by any
      ORGANISATION of which a PERSON is a PATIENT.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr1350_nhs_num_stat_code:
    name: cr1350_nhs_num_stat_code
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR1350_NHS_NUM_STAT_CODE

        value: VARCHAR(2)

      NUMBER
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: NhsNumberStatusIndicatorCode
    required: false

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type

        value: NPP_CR6520_REC1_METASTATIC_TYPE1

    annotations:

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type

  npp_cr1550_diag_palliative_care_specialist_seen_indicator_cancer_recurrence:

    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: NPP_CR1550_DIAG_PALLIATIVE_CARE_SPECIALIST_SEEN_INDICATOR_CANCER_RECURRENCE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)

    annotations:

        value: NPP_CR1590_PROG_METASTATIC_SITE_PROGRESSION2
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The site of the metastatic disease, if any

      More than one site can be recorded'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: MetastaticSite
    required: false
  npp_cr7200_trans_original_morphologyicd_o_3:
    name: npp_cr7200_trans_original_morphologyicd_o_3
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: NPP_CR7200_TRANS_ORIGINAL_MORPHOLOGYICD_O_3
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(7)
    description: Record the morphology ICD-O-3 code of the original diagnosis. This
      will normally be agreed at the MDT by the clinical team.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  npp_cr7210_trans_original_morphology_snomed:
    name: npp_cr7210_trans_original_morphology_snomed
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: NPP_CR7210_TRANS_ORIGINAL_MORPHOLOGY_SNOMED
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(18)
    description: Record the SNOMED morphology code of the original diagnosis. This
      will normally be agreed at the MDT by the clinical team.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  npp_cr7010_trans_morphology_icd_o_3_trans:
    name: npp_cr7010_trans_morphology_icd_o_3_trans
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: NPP_CR7010_TRANS_MORPHOLOGY_ICD_O_3_TRANS
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(7)
    description: The morphology code for the transformation of the cancer as defined
      by ICD-O-3. This can be recorded as well as or instead of MORPHOLOGY (SNOMED)
      TRANSFORMATION.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  npp_cr7000_trans_morphology_snomed_trans:
    name: npp_cr7000_trans_morphology_snomed_trans
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: NPP_CR7000_TRANS_MORPHOLOGY_SNOMED_TRANS
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: This is the TRANSFORMATION DIAGNOSIS using the SNOMED International
      / SNOMED CT code for the cell type of the tumour recorded as part of a Cancer
      Care Spell. This can be recorded as well as or instead of MORPHOLOGY (ICD-O-3)
      TRANSFORMATION.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  npp_cr7030_trans_snomed_version_current_trans:
    name: npp_cr7030_trans_snomed_version_current_trans
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: NPP_CR7030_TRANS_SNOMED_VERSION_CURRENT_TRANS
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: The version of SNOMED used to encode MORPHOLOGY (SNOMED) TRANSFORMATION
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: SnomedVersionTransformation
    required: false
  llsoa:
    name: llsoa
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: LLSOA
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(9)
    description: Lower Layer Super Output Area code, used as a geographic indicator
      for deprivation and service planning.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr3170_person_stated_gender_code:
    name: cr3170_person_stated_gender_code
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3170_PERSON_STATED_GENDER_CODE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: Person's gender as self-declared (or inferred by observation for
      those unable to declare their PERSON STATED GENDER).
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: PersonStatedGenderCode
    required: false
  cr6840_person_sexual_orientation_code_at_diagnosis:
    name: cr6840_person_sexual_orientation_code_at_diagnosis
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6840_PERSON_SEXUAL_ORIENTATION_CODE_AT_DIAGNOSIS
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: 'Person''s sexual orientation as self-declared at the time of the
      PATIENT DIAGNOSIS.

      This complies with the information standard DCB2094.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: PersonSexualOrientationCodeAtDiagnosis
    required: false
  cr0110_general_medical_practitioner_specified:
    name: cr0110_general_medical_practitioner_specified
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR0110_GENERAL_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONER_SPECIFIED
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(8)
    description: 'GENERAL MEDICAL PRACTITIONER (SPECIFIED) is the GENERAL MEDICAL
      PRACTITIONER PPD CODE of the GENERAL MEDICAL PRACTITIONER specified by the PATIENT.

      This GENERAL MEDICAL PRACTITIONER works within the General Medical Practitioner
      Practice with which the PATIENT is registered.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr0120_general_medical_practice_code_patient_registration:
    name: cr0120_general_medical_practice_code_patient_registration
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR0120_GENERAL_MEDICAL_PRACTICE_CODE_PATIENT_REGISTRATION
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(8)
    description: The GENERAL MEDICAL PRACTICE (PATIENT REGISTRATION) is an ORGANISATION
      CODE. This is the code of the GP Practice that the PATIENT is registered with.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr0150_ethnic_category:
    name: cr0150_ethnic_category
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR0150_ETHNIC_CATEGORY
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The ethnicity of a PERSON, as specified by the PERSON. The 16+1
      ethnic data categories defined in the 2001 census is the national mandatory
      standard for the collection and analysis of ethnicity.

      (The Office for National Statistics has developed a further breakdown of the
      group from that given, which may be used locally.)'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: EthnicCategory
    required: false
  cr9060_ethnic_category_2021:
    name: cr9060_ethnic_category_2021
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR9060_ETHNIC_CATEGORY_2021
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The ethnicity of a PERSON, as specified by the PERSON.

      ETHNIC CATEGORY 2021 is the classification used for the 2021 census.

      Note: This item has not been approved by the Data Alliance Partnership Board.
      It has been introduced to provide advance notice to data providers and system
      suppliers of the intention to report this item at a later date. This item should
      not be submitted until further development by NHS England has been undertaken.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr1600_source_of_referral_op:
    name: pp_cr1600_source_of_referral_op
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR1600_SOURCE_OF_REFERRAL_OP
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'This identifies the source of referral of each Consultant Out-Patient
      Episode.

      (See User Guide for further details)'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: SourceOfReferralForOutPatients
    required: false
  pp_cr0230_date_first_seen:
    name: pp_cr0230_date_first_seen
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0230_DATE_FIRST_SEEN
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: This is the date that the PATIENT is first seen in the Trust that
      receives the first referral.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  pp_cr7300_prof_reg_issuer_code_cons_first_seen:
    name: pp_cr7300_prof_reg_issuer_code_cons_first_seen
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7300_PROF_REG_ISSUER_CODE_CONS_FIRST_SEEN
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: A code which identifies the PROFESSIONAL REGISTRATION BODY for the
      Consultant or health care professional who first sees the patient following
      the initial referral which leads to the cancer diagnosis.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: ProfessionalRegistrationIssuerCodeConsultantFirstSeen
    required: false
  pp_cr7310_prof_reg_entry_id_cons_first_seen:
    name: pp_cr7310_prof_reg_entry_id_cons_first_seen
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7310_PROF_REG_ENTRY_ID_CONS_FIRST_SEEN
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(32)
    description: The registration identifier allocated by a Professional Registration
      Body for the Consultant or health care professional who first sees the patient
      following the initial referral which leads to the cancer diagnosis.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr1410_org_site_prov_first_seen:
    name: pp_cr1410_org_site_prov_first_seen
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR1410_ORG_SITE_PROV_FIRST_SEEN
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(9)
    description: The ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the Organisation Site of the Health
      Care Provider at the first contact with the PATIENT.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr1360_date_first_seen_cancer_specialist:
    name: pp_cr1360_date_first_seen_cancer_specialist
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR1360_DATE_FIRST_SEEN_CANCER_SPECIALIST
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: This is the date that the PATIENT is first seen by the appropriate
      specialist for cancer care within a Cancer Care Spell. This is the PERSON or
      PERSONS who are most able to progress the diagnosis of the primary tumour.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  pp_cr1400_org_site_id_prov_first_cancer_specialist:
    name: pp_cr1400_org_site_id_prov_first_cancer_specialist
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR1400_ORG_SITE_ID_PROV_FIRST_CANCER_SPECIALIST
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(9)
    description: The ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the Organisation Site where the PATIENT
      is first seen by an appropriate cancer specialist on the DATE FIRST SEEN (CANCER
      SPECIALIST).
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false

    name: npp_cr0300_source_of_referral
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: NPP_CR0300_SOURCE_OF_REFERRAL
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: (Non Primary Cancer Pathway only.) This identifies the source of

    description: This is the method used to confirm the cancer.

  pp_cr0180_morphology_icd_o_3:
    name: pp_cr0180_morphology_icd_o_3
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0180_MORPHOLOGY_ICD_O_3
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(7)
    description: The morphology code for the diagnosed cancer as defined by ICD-O-3.
      This can be recorded as well as or instead of MORPHOLOGY (SNOMED).
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr6400_curr_morphology_snomed_diag:
    name: pp_cr6400_curr_morphology_snomed_diag
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR6400_CURR_MORPHOLOGY_SNOMED_DIAG
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(18)
    description: This is the PATIENT DIAGNOSIS using the SNOMED International / SNOMED
      CT code for the cell type of the tumour recorded as part of a Cancer Care Spell.
      This can be recorded as well as or instead of MORPHOLOGY (ICD-O-3).
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr6490_curr_snomed_version_diag:
    name: pp_cr6490_curr_snomed_version_diag
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR6490_CURR_SNOMED_VERSION_DIAG
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: The version of SNOMED used to encode MORPHOLOGY (SNOMED) DIAGNOSIS
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: SnomedVersionDiagnosis
    required: false
  pp_cr0480_topography_icd_o_3:
    name: pp_cr0480_topography_icd_o_3
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0480_TOPOGRAPHY_ICD_O_3
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(7)
    description: The topographical site code for the tumour as defined by ICD-O-3.
      This will normally be derived by Registries.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr9010_ki67:
    name: pp_cr9010_ki67
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR9010_KI67
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(3)
    description: 'Record the Ki67 percentage

      This is a pilot data item, required to support the accurate calculation of Grade.

      This is a requirement for Neuroendocrine tumours (NET), optional for all other
      tumour types.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr0410_grade_of_differentiationat_diag:
    name: pp_cr0410_grade_of_differentiationat_diag
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0410_GRADE_OF_DIFFERENTIATIONAT_DIAG
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: GRADE OF DIFFERENTIATION (AT DIAGNOSIS) is the definitive grade of
      the Tumour at the time of PATIENT DIAGNOSIS.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: GradeOfDifferentiationAtDiagnosis
    required: false
  pp_cr0510_performance_status_adult:
    name: pp_cr0510_performance_status_adult
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0510_PERFORMANCE_STATUS_ADULT

    description: A World Health Organisation classification indicating a PERSON's

    owner: COSDResearchView

    - COSDResearchView
    range: PerformanceStatusAdult
    required: false
  pp_cr6830_diagnosis_code_snomedct:

    annotations:
      sql_column:

      sql_type:

    description: DIAGNOSIS CODE (SNOMED CT) is the SNOMED CT concept ID which is used

    range: string

  pp_cr6970_diag_metastatic_site_4:
    name: pp_cr6970_diag_metastatic_site_4
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The site of the metastatic disease, if any, at diagnosis.

    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd

    - COSDResearchView
    range: MetastaticSite
    required: false
  pp_cr7600_primary_diag_subsidiary_comment:
    name: pp_cr7600_primary_diag_subsidiary_comment
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7600_PRIMARY_DIAG_SUBSIDIARY_COMMENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(50)
    description: 'Additional comments on diagnosis where coding is difficult or imprecise.
      (Examples of this would be: "papillary glioneuronal tumour" or "angiocentric
      glioma" to specify recently described diagnoses which do not have ICD10 or ICD-O-3
      coding. "anaplastic ependymoma" or "ependymoblastoma" to distinguish between
      these two diagnoses which may have different treatment decisions or outcomes
      but which cannot be distinguished in ICD10 or ICD-O-3 coding.)'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr7610_secondary_diag_icd1:
    name: pp_cr7610_secondary_diag_icd1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7610_SECONDARY_DIAG_ICD1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(6)
    description: Types (ICD10 codes) of other significant conditions (e.g. Down Syndrome,
      NF1, Fanconi anaemia) which may predispose to cancer or influence treatment.
      Possible multiple entries.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr7610_secondary_diag_icd2:
    name: pp_cr7610_secondary_diag_icd2
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7610_SECONDARY_DIAG_ICD2
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(6)
    description: Types (ICD10 codes) of other significant conditions (e.g. Down Syndrome,
      NF1, Fanconi anaemia) which may predispose to cancer or influence treatment.
      Possible multiple entries.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr7620_other_significant_diag_subsidiary_comment:
    name: pp_cr7620_other_significant_diag_subsidiary_comment
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7620_OTHER_SIGNIFICANT_DIAG_SUBSIDIARY_COMMENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(50)
    description: Additional comments on other significant conditions where coding
      is difficult or imprecise. (For example "NF1" or "NF2" to distinguish between
      these two distinct conditions which may have different treatment decisions or
      outcomes but cannot be coded separately.)
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr7630_familial_cancer_syndrome:
    name: pp_cr7630_familial_cancer_syndrome
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7630_FAMILIAL_CANCER_SYNDROME
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: Indicate whether there is a possible or confirmed familial cancer
      syndrome
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: FamilialCancerSyndrome
    required: false
  pp_cr7640_familial_cancer_syndrome_subsidiary_comment:
    name: pp_cr7640_familial_cancer_syndrome_subsidiary_comment
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7640_FAMILIAL_CANCER_SYNDROME_SUBSIDIARY_COMMENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(50)
    description: Specifies or describes familial cancer syndrome where Familial Cancer
      Syndrome is coded as "Yes" or "Possible". (For example "Li-Fraumeni", "Rhabdoid
      tumour predisposition syndrome" or "Biallelic PMS2 mutation" to identify distinct
      syndromes which may have different treatment decisions or outcomes but cannot
      be coded separately.)
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr9020_functional_syndrome_class_indicator:
    name: pp_cr9020_functional_syndrome_class_indicator
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR9020_FUNCTIONAL_SYNDROME_CLASS_INDICATOR
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: Indicate whether there is a possible or confirmed Functional syndrome

    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7010_MORPHOLOGY_ICD_O_3_TRANS1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(7)
    description: The morphology code for the transformation of the cancer as defined
      by ICD-O-3. This can be recorded as well as or instead of MORPHOLOGY (SNOMED)
      TRANSFORMATION.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr7000_curr_morphology_snomed_trans1:
    name: pp_cr7000_curr_morphology_snomed_trans1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7000_CURR_MORPHOLOGY_SNOMED_TRANS1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(18)
    description: This is the TRANSFORMATION DIAGNOSIS using the SNOMED International
      / SNOMED CT code for the cell type of the tumour recorded as part of a Cancer
      Care Spell. This can be recorded as well as or instead of MORPHOLOGY (ICD-O-3)
      TRANSFORMATION.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr7030_curr_snomed_version_trans1:
    name: pp_cr7030_curr_snomed_version_trans1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7030_CURR_SNOMED_VERSION_TRANS1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: The version of SNOMED used to encode MORPHOLOGY (SNOMED) TRANSFORMATION
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: SnomedVersionTransformation
    required: false
  pp_cr7020_transformation_date_2:

    annotations:

        tag: sql_column

        value: DATE
    description: The DATE the transformation was agreed by the clinical team.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  pp_cr7010_morphology_icd_o_3_trans2:
    name: pp_cr7010_morphology_icd_o_3_trans2
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7010_MORPHOLOGY_ICD_O_3_TRANS2
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(7)
    description: The morphology code for the transformation of the cancer as defined
      by ICD-O-3. This can be recorded as well as or instead of MORPHOLOGY (SNOMED)
      TRANSFORMATION.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView

  pp_cr7000_curr_morphology_snomed_trans2:
    name: pp_cr7000_curr_morphology_snomed_trans2
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR7000_CURR_MORPHOLOGY_SNOMED_TRANS2
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(18)
    description: This is the TRANSFORMATION DIAGNOSIS using the SNOMED International
      / SNOMED CT code for the cell type of the tumour recorded as part of a Cancer
      Care Spell. This can be recorded as well as or instead of MORPHOLOGY (ICD-O-3)
      TRANSFORMATION.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false

        value: PP_CR7030_CURR_SNOMED_VERSION_TRANS2
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: The version of SNOMED used to encode MORPHOLOGY (SNOMED) TRANSFORMATION
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: SnomedVersionTransformation
    required: false

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type

    name: cr6760_history_of_alcohol_current
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6760_HISTORY_OF_ALCOHOL_CURRENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: 'Specify the current history of alcohol consumption for the patient
      (≤3 months) from date of diagnosis

      These are based on the UK Chief Medical Officers'' Alcohol Guideline Review
      (Jan 2016)'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: HistoryOfAlcoholCurrent

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: 'Specify the past history of alcohol consumption for the patient
      (>3 months) from date of diagnosis

    range: HistoryOfAlcoholPast

    annotations:

        tag: sql_column
        value: CR7920_HOL_ASSESSMENT_CARE_PLAN_STATUS1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: An indication of whether a PATIENT has completed a Holistic Needs
      Assessment (HNA) and /or Personalised Care and Support Plan (PCSP) was offered/completed
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000

    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: AssessmentCarePlanStatus

  cr7930_hol_assessment_care_plan_date1:
    name: cr7930_hol_assessment_care_plan_date1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR7930_HOL_ASSESSMENT_CARE_PLAN_DATE1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: The date a Holistic Needs Assessment or Personalised Care and Support
      Plan is offered, declined, completed not required, or unable to be completed.
      In addition, a date should be provided where a decision was made not to offer
      an assessment 'Not Offered' for valid clinical reasons.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:

    range: date

  cr0470_planned_cancer_treatment_type1:
    name: cr0470_planned_cancer_treatment_type1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR0470_PLANNED_CANCER_TREATMENT_TYPE1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: This is the clinically proposed treatment, usually agreed at a Multi
      Disciplinary Team Meeting, and may not be the same as the treatment which is
      subsequently agreed with the patient. More than one planned treatment type may
      be recorded and these may either be alternative or sequential treatments.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: PlannedCancerTreatmentType
    required: false
  cr0470_planned_cancer_treatment_type2:
    name: cr0470_planned_cancer_treatment_type2
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR0470_PLANNED_CANCER_TREATMENT_TYPE2

        tag: sql_type

    description: This is the clinically proposed treatment, usually agreed at a Multi
      Disciplinary Team Meeting, and may not be the same as the treatment which is
      subsequently agreed with the patient. More than one planned treatment type may
      be recorded and these may either be alternative or sequential treatments.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: PlannedCancerTreatmentType

        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(15)
    description: T CATEGORY (FINAL PRETREATMENT) is the code which classifies the
      size and extent of the primary tumour before treatment.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr0540_n_category_final_pretreatment:
    name: pp_cr0540_n_category_final_pretreatment
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0540_N_CATEGORY_FINAL_PRETREATMENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(15)
    description: N CATEGORY (FINAL PRETREATMENT) is the code which classifies the
      absence or presence and extent of regional lymph node metastases before treatment.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr0560_m_category_final_pretreatment:
    name: pp_cr0560_m_category_final_pretreatment
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0560_M_CATEGORY_FINAL_PRETREATMENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(15)
    description: M CATEGORY (FINAL PRETREATMENT) is the code which classifies the
      absence or presence of distant metastases pre treatment.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr0580_tnm_stage_grouping_final_pretreatment:
    name: pp_cr0580_tnm_stage_grouping_final_pretreatment
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0580_TNM_STAGE_GROUPING_FINAL_PRETREATMENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(15)
    description: 'Record the overall clinical TNM stage grouping of the tumour, derived
      from each T, N and M component prior to treatment. This classification is based
      on all the evidence available to the clinician(s) with responsibility for assessing
      the patient and for the patient’s treatment plan. Such evidence arises from
      physical examination, imaging, endoscopy, biopsy, surgical exploration and other
      relevant examinations.

      The overall pretreatment TNM stage grouping indicates the tumour stage at the
      time the treatment plan was devised.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr6800_org_site_id_reported_pretreatment_tnm_stage:
    name: pp_cr6800_org_site_id_reported_pretreatment_tnm_stage
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR6800_ORG_SITE_ID_REPORTED_PRETREATMENT_TNM_STAGE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(9)
    description: This is the ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the ORGANISATION SITE where
      the diagnosing MDT agreed the Final PreTreatment TNM Stage
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr3120_stage_date_final_pretreatment_stage:
    name: pp_cr3120_stage_date_final_pretreatment_stage
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR3120_STAGE_DATE_FINAL_PRETREATMENT_STAGE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: The date of the TNM STAGE GROUPING (FINAL PRE TREATMENT).
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  pp_cr0620_t_category_integrated_stage:
    name: pp_cr0620_t_category_integrated_stage
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0620_T_CATEGORY_INTEGRATED_STAGE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(15)
    description: T CATEGORY (INTEGRATED) is the code which classifies the size and
      extent of the primary tumour after treatment and/or after all available evidence
      has been collected.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr0630_n_category_integrated_stage:
    name: pp_cr0630_n_category_integrated_stage
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0630_N_CATEGORY_INTEGRATED_STAGE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(15)
    description: N CATEGORY (INTEGRATED) is the code which classifies the absence
      or presence and extent of regional lymph node metastases after treatment and/or
      after all available evidence has been collected.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr0640_m_category_integrated_stage:
    name: pp_cr0640_m_category_integrated_stage
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0640_M_CATEGORY_INTEGRATED_STAGE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(15)
    description: M CATEGORY (INTEGRATED) is the code classifies the absence or presence
      of distant metastases after treatment and/or after all available evidence has
      been collected.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr0610_tnm_stage_grouping_integrated:
    name: pp_cr0610_tnm_stage_grouping_integrated
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR0610_TNM_STAGE_GROUPING_INTEGRATED
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(15)
    description: 'Record the overall TNM stage grouping of the tumour, derived from
      each T, N and M component after treatment. This classification is based on all
      the evidence available to the clinician(s) with responsibility for assessing
      the patient. Such evidence arises from physical examination, imaging, endoscopy,
      biopsy, surgical exploration and other relevant examinations.

      The overall integrated TNM stage grouping indicates the tumour stage after treatment
      and/or after all available evidence has been collected.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  pp_cr6810_org_site_id_reported_integrated_tnm_stage:
    name: pp_cr6810_org_site_id_reported_integrated_tnm_stage
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR6810_ORG_SITE_ID_REPORTED_INTEGRATED_TNM_STAGE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(9)
    description: This is the ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the ORGANISATION SITE where
      the treating MDT post surgery (where surgery was the first treatment) agreed
      the Integrated TNM Stage
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false

    name: pp_cr3130_stage_date_integrated_stage
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR3130_STAGE_DATE_INTEGRATED_STAGE

        value: DATE
    description: The date of the TNM STAGE GROUPING (INTEGRATED)
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  pp_cr6980_tnm_coding_edition:
    name: pp_cr6980_tnm_coding_edition
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR6980_TNM_CODING_EDITION
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: The TNM Coding edition in use
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000

  pp_cr2070_tnm_version_number_staging:
    name: pp_cr2070_tnm_version_number_staging
    annotations:

    description: The AJCC, UICC or ENETS version number used for Tumour, Node and

    annotations:

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type

    description: This is the ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the ORGANISATION SITE who

        value: PP_CR8310_STAGE_DATE_SITE_SPECIFIC_STAGE1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: The date of the sample/MDT which provided a positive stage outcome

    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: PP_CR8310_STAGE_DATE_SITE_SPECIFIC_STAGE2
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: The date of the sample/MDT which provided a positive stage outcome
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView

    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  cr6540_treat1_adjunctive_therapy:
    name: cr6540_treat1_adjunctive_therapy
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6540_TREAT1_ADJUNCTIVE_THERAPY
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: 'Adjunctive therapy is therapy given in addition to the main therapy
      to maximize its effectiveness.

      This field allows for the accurate recording of these to determine if Adjunctive
      therapy was Adjuvant (After the main therapy) or Neo-Adjuvant (Before the main
      therapy) or not applicable.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: AdjunctiveTherapy
    required: false
  cr0680_treat1_cancer_treatment_intent:
    name: cr0680_treat1_cancer_treatment_intent
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR0680_TREAT1_CANCER_TREATMENT_INTENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The intention of the cancer treatment provided during a Cancer Care
      Spell.

      * Disease Modification is Drug Specific ** Diagnostic and Staging are Surgery
      Specific'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: CancerTreatmentIntent
    required: false
  cr1370_treat1_treatment_start_date_cancer:
    name: cr1370_treat1_treatment_start_date_cancer
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR1370_TREAT1_TREATMENT_START_DATE_CANCER
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: This is the Start Date of the first, second or subsequent cancer
      treatment given to a PATIENT who is receiving care for a cancer condition.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  cr2040_treat1_cancer_treatment_modality_registration:
    name: cr2040_treat1_cancer_treatment_modality_registration
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR2040_TREAT1_CANCER_TREATMENT_MODALITY_REGISTRATION
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The type of treatment or care which was delivered in a Cancer Treatment
      Period.

      This is subset of Cancer Treatment Modality, which supports Cancer Registration
      in England'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: CancerTreatmentModalityRegistration
    required: false
  cr1450_treat1_org_site_id_of_provider_cancer_treatment_start_date:
    name: cr1450_treat1_org_site_id_of_provider_cancer_treatment_start_date
    annotations:
      sql_column:

        value: CR1450_TREAT1_ORG_SITE_ID_OF_PROVIDER_CANCER_TREATMENT_START_DATE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(9)
    description: The ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the Organisation Site where the TREATMENT

    range: string

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(32)
    description: The registration identifier allocated by a Professional Registration
      Body for the Consultant or health care professional responsible for the treatment
      of the patient.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView

    range: string

      If he/she is part of a surgical team, add all consultant surgeons responsible
      for the procedure.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false

        tag: sql_type

    name: cr6480_treat1_unplanned_return_to_theatre_indicator
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6480_TREAT1_UNPLANNED_RETURN_TO_THEATRE_INDICATOR
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: Whether or not the patient required a second (unplanned) operation
      during the same admission as the primary procedure
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView

  cr6010_treat1_asa_score:
    name: cr6010_treat1_asa_score
    annotations:

        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6010_TREAT1_ASA_SCORE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: The ASA physical status classification system is a system for assessing
      the fitness of patients before surgery.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:

    range: AsaScore
    required: false
  cr6310_treat1_surgery_surgical_access_type:
    name: cr6310_treat1_surgery_surgical_access_type
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6310_TREAT1_SURGERY_SURGICAL_ACCESS_TYPE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: The surgical access type used to perform the main procedure.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: SurgicalAccessType
    required: false
  cr6540_treat2_adjunctive_therapy:
    name: cr6540_treat2_adjunctive_therapy
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6540_TREAT2_ADJUNCTIVE_THERAPY
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: 'Adjunctive therapy is therapy given in addition to the main therapy
      to maximize its effectiveness.

      This field allows for the accurate recording of these to determine if Adjunctive
      therapy was Adjuvant (After the main therapy) or Neo-Adjuvant (Before the main
      therapy) or not applicable.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: AdjunctiveTherapy
    required: false
  cr0680_treat2_cancer_treatment_intent:
    name: cr0680_treat2_cancer_treatment_intent
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR0680_TREAT2_CANCER_TREATMENT_INTENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The intention of the cancer treatment provided during a Cancer Care
      Spell.

      * Disease Modification is Drug Specific ** Diagnostic and Staging are Surgery
      Specific'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: CancerTreatmentIntent
    required: false
  cr1370_treat2_treatment_start_date_cancer:
    name: cr1370_treat2_treatment_start_date_cancer
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR1370_TREAT2_TREATMENT_START_DATE_CANCER
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: This is the Start Date of the first, second or subsequent cancer
      treatment given to a PATIENT who is receiving care for a cancer condition.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  cr2040_treat2_cancer_treatment_modality_registration:
    name: cr2040_treat2_cancer_treatment_modality_registration
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR2040_TREAT2_CANCER_TREATMENT_MODALITY_REGISTRATION
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The type of treatment or care which was delivered in a Cancer Treatment
      Period.

      This is subset of Cancer Treatment Modality, which supports Cancer Registration
      in England'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: CancerTreatmentModalityRegistration
    required: false
  cr1450_treat2_org_site_id_of_provider_cancer_treatment_start_date:
    name: cr1450_treat2_org_site_id_of_provider_cancer_treatment_start_date

    range: string

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(18)
    description: This is a procedure other than the PRIMARY PROCEDURE, carried out
      and recorded for CDS or Hospital Episode Statistics purposes. (This may occur
      more than once).This maybe recorded in addition to PROCEDURE (OPCS).
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr3050_treat2_procedure_snomed_ct4:
    name: cr3050_treat2_procedure_snomed_ct4
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3050_TREAT2_PROCEDURE_SNOMED_CT4
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(18)
    description: This is a procedure other than the PRIMARY PROCEDURE, carried out

    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd

  cr6480_treat2_unplanned_return_to_theatre_indicator:
    name: cr6480_treat2_unplanned_return_to_theatre_indicator
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6480_TREAT2_UNPLANNED_RETURN_TO_THEATRE_INDICATOR
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: Whether or not the patient required a second (unplanned) operation
      during the same admission as the primary procedure
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:

    range: UnplannedReturnToTheatreIndicator
    required: false
  cr6010_treat2_asa_score:
    name: cr6010_treat2_asa_score
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6010_TREAT2_ASA_SCORE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: The ASA physical status classification system is a system for assessing
      the fitness of patients before surgery.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: AsaScore
    required: false
  cr6310_treat2_surgery_surgical_access_type:
    name: cr6310_treat2_surgery_surgical_access_type
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6310_TREAT2_SURGERY_SURGICAL_ACCESS_TYPE
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: The surgical access type used to perform the main procedure.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: SurgicalAccessType
    required: false
  cr6540_treat3_adjunctive_therapy:
    name: cr6540_treat3_adjunctive_therapy
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR6540_TREAT3_ADJUNCTIVE_THERAPY
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(1)
    description: 'Adjunctive therapy is therapy given in addition to the main therapy
      to maximize its effectiveness.

      This field allows for the accurate recording of these to determine if Adjunctive
      therapy was Adjuvant (After the main therapy) or Neo-Adjuvant (Before the main
      therapy) or not applicable.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: AdjunctiveTherapy
    required: false
  cr0680_treat3_cancer_treatment_intent:
    name: cr0680_treat3_cancer_treatment_intent
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR0680_TREAT3_CANCER_TREATMENT_INTENT
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The intention of the cancer treatment provided during a Cancer Care
      Spell.

      * Disease Modification is Drug Specific ** Diagnostic and Staging are Surgery
      Specific'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: CancerTreatmentIntent
    required: false
  cr1370_treat3_treatment_start_date_cancer:
    name: cr1370_treat3_treatment_start_date_cancer
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR1370_TREAT3_TREATMENT_START_DATE_CANCER
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: This is the Start Date of the first, second or subsequent cancer
      treatment given to a PATIENT who is receiving care for a cancer condition.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: date
    required: false
  cr2040_treat3_cancer_treatment_modality_registration:

    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR2040_TREAT3_CANCER_TREATMENT_MODALITY_REGISTRATION
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The type of treatment or care which was delivered in a Cancer Treatment
      Period.

      This is subset of Cancer Treatment Modality, which supports Cancer Registration
      in England'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: CancerTreatmentModalityRegistration
    required: false
  cr1450_treat3_org_site_id_of_provider_cancer_treatment_start_date:
    name: cr1450_treat3_org_site_id_of_provider_cancer_treatment_start_date

      sql_column:

    annotations:

        value: CR8410_TREAT3_CON_TREAT_PROF_REGENTRY_IDENTIFIER
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(32)
    description: The registration identifier allocated by a Professional Registration

      of the patient.

    rank: 1000

    required: false
  cr1370_treat4_treatment_start_date_cancer:
    name: cr1370_treat4_treatment_start_date_cancer
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR1370_TREAT4_TREATMENT_START_DATE_CANCER
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: DATE
    description: This is the Start Date of the first, second or subsequent cancer
      treatment given to a PATIENT who is receiving care for a cancer condition.

        value: CR2040_TREAT4_CANCER_TREATMENT_MODALITY_REGISTRATION
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)
    description: 'The type of treatment or care which was delivered in a Cancer Treatment
      Period.

      in England'

    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: CancerTreatmentModalityRegistration

      sql_type:

        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(4)
    description: PRIMARY PROCEDURE (OPCS) is the OPCS Classification of Interventions
      and Procedures code which is used to identify the primary Patient Procedure

    required: false

        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(8)

        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(2)

  cr1610_imaging_code_nicip1:
    name: cr1610_imaging_code_nicip1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR1610_IMAGING_CODE_NICIP1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(6)
    description: IMAGING CODE (NICIP) is the National Interim Clinical Imaging Procedure
      Code Set code which is used to identify both the test modality and body site
      of the test.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false

    annotations:

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(19)
    description: IMAGING CODE (SNOMED-CT) is the SNOMED CT concept ID which is used
      to identify both the test modality and body site of the test.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(4)
    description: 'The type of imaging procedure used during an Imaging or Radiodiagnostic

    description: IMAGING CODE (NICIP) is the National Interim Clinical Imaging Procedure
      Code Set code which is used to identify both the test modality and body site
      of the test.

  cr8100_mdt_discussion1:
    name: cr8100_mdt_discussion1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR8100_MDT_DISCUSSION1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: Record if the patient was not discussed within a MDT Meeting
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: MultidisciplinaryTeamMeetingDiscussion
    required: false
  cr8110_mdt_discussion_type1:
    name: cr8110_mdt_discussion_type1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR8110_MDT_DISCUSSION_TYPE1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: Record if the patient was discussed within a Multidisciplinary Team
      Meeting (MDTM)
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: MultidisciplinaryTeamMeetingDiscussionType
    required: false
  cr3080_mdt_date1:
    name: cr3080_mdt_date1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3080_MDT_DATE1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: Record the date of each Multidisciplinary Team meeting where the
      patient was discussed.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr3090_mdt_organisation_site_id1:
    name: cr3090_mdt_organisation_site_id1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3090_MDT_ORGANISATION_SITE_ID1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: The ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the Organisation Site where the Multidisciplinary
      Team Meeting took place. (For joint MDT meetings a new MDT section must be recorded
      for each meeting)
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr3190_mdt_type1:
    name: cr3190_mdt_type1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3190_MDT_TYPE1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: 'Record the type of MDT meeting at which the patient was discussed.
      Please provide the most detailed level of information that is possible.

      Note: the codes at the high level (shown in bold) are Tumour groups and the
      items below each high-level code are Multidisciplinary Teams. ORGANISATIONS
      should only use the high-level code if the Multidisciplinary Team is not listed.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: MultidisciplinaryTeamMeetingType
    required: false
  cr3160_mdt_type_comment1:
    name: cr3160_mdt_type_comment1
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3160_MDT_TYPE_COMMENT1
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(60)
    description: To provide additional information on the MDT Meeting type where not
      covered in the list provided
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr8100_mdt_discussion2:
    name: cr8100_mdt_discussion2
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR8100_MDT_DISCUSSION2
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: Record if the patient was not discussed within a MDT Meeting
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: MultidisciplinaryTeamMeetingDiscussion
    required: false
  cr8110_mdt_discussion_type2:
    name: cr8110_mdt_discussion_type2
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR8110_MDT_DISCUSSION_TYPE2
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: Record if the patient was discussed within a Multidisciplinary Team
      Meeting (MDTM)

    description: The ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the Organisation Site where the Multidisciplinary

  cr3160_mdt_type_comment8:

    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3160_MDT_TYPE_COMMENT8
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(60)
    description: To provide additional information on the MDT Meeting type where not
      covered in the list provided
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView

    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr8100_mdt_discussion9:

    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR8100_MDT_DISCUSSION9
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: Record if the patient was not discussed within a MDT Meeting
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd

      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: Record if the patient was discussed within a Multidisciplinary Team
      Meeting (MDTM)
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: MultidisciplinaryTeamMeetingDiscussionType
    required: false
  cr3080_mdt_date9:
    name: cr3080_mdt_date9
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3080_MDT_DATE9
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: Record the date of each Multidisciplinary Team meeting where the
      patient was discussed.
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr3090_mdt_organisation_site_id9:
    name: cr3090_mdt_organisation_site_id9
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3090_MDT_ORGANISATION_SITE_ID9
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: The ORGANISATION IDENTIFIER of the Organisation Site where the Multidisciplinary
      Team Meeting took place. (For joint MDT meetings a new MDT section must be recorded
      for each meeting)
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: string
    required: false
  cr3190_mdt_type9:
    name: cr3190_mdt_type9
    annotations:
      sql_column:
        tag: sql_column
        value: CR3190_MDT_TYPE9
      sql_type:
        tag: sql_type
        value: VARCHAR(20)
    description: 'Record the type of MDT meeting at which the patient was discussed.
      Please provide the most detailed level of information that is possible.

      Note: the codes at the high level (shown in bold) are Tumour groups and the
      items below each high-level code are Multidisciplinary Teams. ORGANISATIONS
      should only use the high-level code if the Multidisciplinary Team is not listed.'
    from_schema: https://health-informatics-uon.github.io/nuh-data/datasets/cosd
    rank: 1000
    owner: COSDResearchView
    domain_of:
    - COSDResearchView
    range: MultidisciplinaryTeamMeetingType
    required: false
